ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vps_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VPS plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the VPS plan (e.g., Baby, Basic VPS 1) */,
  "disk_space" TEXT /* Disk space allocated for the plan */,
  "ram" TEXT /* Amount of RAM allocated for the plan */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU configuration for the plan */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth allocated for the plan */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options available for the plan (e.g., virtualization type) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the plan */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of operating system supported (e.g., Linux, Windows) */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the plan is shared or dedicated */,
  "is_promo" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the plan is a promotional offer */,
  "max_bandwidth" REAL /* Maximum bandwidth limit in TB */,
  "max_connections" INTEGER /* Maximum number of simultaneous connections */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the plan is currently available for purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for customer account */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to another customer who referred this customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer subscribing to the plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VPS plan being subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subscription (active, canceled) */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subscription will auto-renew */,
  "billing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of billing (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code for any applied discounts */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount applied */,
  "upgrade_eligible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subscription is eligible for an upgrade */,
  "last_renewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES vps_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription being billed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount charged for the billing cycle */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for billing */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the billing record */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax applied */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount including tax and discounts */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who raised the ticket */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (open, resolved, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin assigned to the ticket */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin who resolved the ticket */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the ticket in minutes */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., technical, billing, account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription being monitored */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage of the VPS */,
  "ram_usage" REAL /* RAM usage in GB */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage in GB */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded utilization */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "io_usage" REAL /* I/O usage percentage */,
  "load_average" TEXT /* Load average over the last 1, 5, and 15 minutes */,
  "memory_swap" REAL /* Swap memory usage in GB */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the VPS */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last resource check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details related to the payment method (e.g., card number, email) */,
  "card_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the credit card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment method */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default payment method */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VPS plan being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Customer's comments about the VPS plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified customer */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been flagged for review */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES vps_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (read/unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., subscription, billing, support) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin who sent the notification */,
  "is_email_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an email notification was sent */,
  "is_sms_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an SMS notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., superadmin, support, billing) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the admin account is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
